Layout.name: FAT Page

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "level" ; 3 ) & SetProperty ( "server_mode" ; "Preview" ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; FAT Package::Export Package Sub Path ) & SetProperty ( "package_friendly_id" ; FAT Package::JSON Friendly id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type_name" ; FAT Package::Package type name )
IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type) Or notDeveloper
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

SetProperty ( "fat_title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "funkis_cloud_title_id" ; FAT Title::Funkis Cloud Title id ) & SetProperty ( "title_environment" ; FAT Title::Title Environment )
FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
Not FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"

StyledText.Data: Add a new page item on this page

LayoutObject.name: Portal

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")

SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page item") & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; FAT Page::PrimaryKey) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_type" ; "Page" ) & SetProperty ( "item_level" ; 4 )
Not SubtitleMedia ( Media PI 1::Container file extension )

ScriptReference.name: View card Page item IO setting

Calculation.Text: isEditor Or isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled
IsEmpty (FAT Page item::IO id Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item::IO id array Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey) Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO enabled
IsEmpty ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfTagValues = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfTagValues = 0
IsEmpty ( FAT Score Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfScoreValues = 0
IsEmpty (FAT Score Condititon @ PI::PrimaryKey) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
IsEmpty ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfTagValues = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfTagValues = 0
IsEmpty ( FAT Score Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfScoreValues = 0
IsEmpty (FAT Score Condititon @ PI::PrimaryKey) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0 And FAT Page item::PI LI NumberOfScoreConditions = 0

LayoutObject.name: Page item info

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 2)

LayoutObject.name: Page item info

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 2)

StyledText.Data: Total number of page items: <<Number of page items>>

Calculation.Text: "Add a new block to this page"
FAT Page::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
FAT Page::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator

SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; "Page" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; FAT Page::Parent id ) & SetProperty ( "item_description" ; FAT Page::DisplayText ) & SetProperty ( "item_sortindex" ; FAT Page::SortIndex )
IsEmpty(FAT Title::Base project) Or FAT Page::Page type≠"default" Or FAT Package::Package type id = "Site"
"Main menu image" & ¶ & Case ( Package type::Name = "Scroll"; "1X-size = 106*106 px, no crop." ; "" )
IsEmpty(FAT Title::Base project) Or FAT Page::Page type≠"default" Or FAT Package::Package type id = "Site"

StyledText.Data: <<Media Main Menu Image PG::Container original filename>> Width <<Media Main Menu Image PG::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media Main Menu Image PG::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media Main Menu Image PG::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (Media Main Menu Image PG::Media container) Or IsEmpty(FAT Title::Base project)
IsEmpty (Media Main Menu Image PG::Media container)

StyledText.Data: Block type: <<Block type @ Page template::Name>> Block page type: <<Block page type>>

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; "Link to page " & FAT Page::DisplayText )
FAT Link @ Page::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator Or isEditor

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; "Link to page " & FAT Page::DisplayText )
Not FAT Link @ Page::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Package type::Name ≠ "Slide"

SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; "Page" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; FAT Page::Parent id ) & SetProperty ( "item_description" ; FAT Page::DisplayText ) & SetProperty ( "item_sortindex" ; FAT Page::SortIndex )
"Duplicate the current page item with all content and settings"

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; FAT Page::DisplayText & " - Link" )
"Create a link to this page item"
FAT Link @ Page::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator Or isEditor

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; "Link to page " & FAT Page::DisplayText )
"Create a link to this page item"
Not FAT Link @ Page::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator

LayoutObject.name: "Modifier Portal"

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page::Importance = 1 And PrivilegeAccess ( FAT Modifier @ Page::Privilege )

LayoutObject.name: Media filename 3

Calculation.Text: SetProperty("title_id"; FAT Link MV @ Page::Title id) & SetProperty("link_type"; FAT Link MV @ Page::Link type) & SetProperty("item_id"; FAT Link MV @ Page::Internal Item id) & SetProperty("item_type"; FAT Link MV @ Page::Internal item type) & SetProperty("link_url"; FAT Link MV @ Page::Link ModifierValue)

"Link behaviour: " & FAT Link MV @ Page::Link behaviour & "¶" & "Item type: " & FAT Link MV @ Page::Internal item type & "¶" & "URL: " & FAT Link MV @ Page::Link ModifierValue & "¶" & "Click to follow link."
FAT Modifier @ Page::Type ≠ "Link" Or IsEmpty ( FAT ModifierValue @ Page::Value )
FAT Modifier @ Page::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Page::ValuesList) <5
FAT Modifier @ Page::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Page::ValuesList) > 4

StyledText.Data: <<FAT Modifier @ Page::Description>> Input type: <<FAT Modifier @ Page::Type>> Access: <<FAT Modifier @ Page::Privilege>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page::Type ≠ "String" And FAT Modifier @ Page::Type ≠ "Prettified string" And FAT Modifier @ Page::Type ≠ "URL encoded string" And FAT Modifier @ Page::Type ≠ "Number" And FAT Modifier @ Page::Type ≠ "Sync server path"

LayoutObject.name: Media inout 3

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page::Type ≠ "Media" Or Not SubtitleMedia ( Media MV PG::Container file extension )
"Select for which IO context this tag should work in"
PatternCount (JSONGetElement ( FAT Tag Value @ PG::Tag Value JSON ; "valuelist_id" ) ; "funkis-cloud")
"How will this page item behave if the user doesn't have the tag active?"
"Select a logic operator when combining multiple tags."
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
"Explore blocks that can be added to this page"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Package type::Name ≠ "Slide"
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "view_block" ; FAT Page Block VL::PrimaryKey )

LayoutObject.name: Eye 2
Eye with stroke 2

StyledText.Data: IMPORTANT! To make interaction of this portal work in WebDirect: No grouped items in portal Text fields - such as media filename positioned in the bottom.
